---
title: "Semantics Part 2: How Meanings Work"
author: "Vaishnav Sudarshan"
date: "2025-4-11"
categories:  [Cool Linguistics Stuff]
abstract: We know how meanings are arranged and put together, but how are they actually understood?
---

# Interesting Ambiguities

## Negations

## Tense

## Double Meanings

# Formal Semantics

# Semantic Drift



## Example: lol

The abbreviation "lol" technically means "laughing out loud", but nowadays, no one uses it for extreme humor.  

# Replacement

## Example: bear in PIE
